who: solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month
offer: For solo practitioners in law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, inefficient document management causes late filings. We provide a streamlined e-filing solution instead of manual filing and document storage systems.
problem: inefficient document management and e-filing processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for legal practitioners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about legal workflows
Direct message solo practitioners with a demo video
Participate in forums for legal professionals sharing tools
try_it: Let users try searchable document repository and basic e-filing capabilities on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short user interviews for feedback
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
